name: Ava Mitchell
description: Ava is Miss Central Indiana, an Indiana University senior studying elementary education. Her community initiative, "Turning Pages," has placed over 4,000 free books in Central Indiana classrooms, and she competes with a classical vocal performance.

name: Sophia Bennett
description: Sophia is Miss White River, a nursing student and mental health advocate who speaks in Delaware County schools about reducing stigma around anxiety and depression. She competes with a lyrical dance routine.

name: Harper Collins
description: Harper is Miss Central Indiana's Teen. A sophomore and student council leader, she built a peer-mentoring program to prevent bullying in Hamilton County middle schools and performs classical piano.

name: Ruby Alvarez
description: Ruby is Miss White River's Teen, representing Henry County. She founded a after-school mentoring circle for younger girls and competes with a musical theatre vocal number.

name: Chloe Nguyen
description: Chloe is Miss Central Indiana, an engineering major on a mission to get more girls into STEM through the hands-on workshops she runs at local libraries. She competes on violin.

name: Mia Thompson
description: Mia is Miss White River, a Madison County native and former foster youth who now advocates statewide for children in the foster care system. Her talent is contemporary vocal.

name: Grace Parker
description: Grace is Miss Central Indiana's Teen, a competitive baton twirler who volunteers weekly with Special Olympics Indiana and hopes to study occupational therapy.

name: Isabella Ford
description: Isabella is Miss White River's Teen from Wayne County. She teaches free art classes at her local community center and competes with a contemporary dance solo.

name: Lily Brooks
description: Lily is our Shining Star spotlight, a Grant County ambassador for individuals with disabilities who joins our titleholders at appearances throughout the year to share her story.

name: Emma Walsh
description: Emma is Miss Central Indiana, a communications major and proud military kid who supports Hoosier veteran families through a care-package initiative she started in high school. She competes with a tap routine.
